Issue: I am planning to start using HackerRank for hiring, can you help us with the infosec  process of my company by filling in the forms
Subject: Using HackerRank for hiring
Response:
To help you with the infosec process of your company using HackerRank, I need more information about your specific requirements and setup. However, I can guide you through the general process of creating tests and inviting candidates.

To create tests, you can follow these steps:

1. Go to the Tests page and click Create Test.
2. Choose an applicable role to create a test.
3. Add questions from the Library or your custom question repository using the Add from Library option.

To invite candidates, you can send them an email invitation containing the link to Start Test.

If you need more detailed information or have specific questions about the infosec process, I recommend checking the HackerRank documentation or reaching out to their support team for further assistance.

If you continue to experience issues, please contact support@hackerrank.com for further assistance.

Issue: I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances  that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time. I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could  provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment. Thank you for your understanding and support.
Response:
To reschedule your HackerRank assessment, you'll need to reinvite yourself to the test. Please follow these steps:

1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account.
2. Go to the Tests tab.
3. Open the test from which you want to reinvite yourself.
4. Go to the Candidates tab.
5. Select the checkbox next to your name.
6. Click Invite selected.

This will send a new invitation to you, allowing you to retake the assessment at a later time.

Issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
Subject: Website Data crawl
Response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in the top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

Alternatively, you can set a crawl delay using the Crawl-delay extension:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Crawl-delay: 1

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
Response:
To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, follow these steps:

1. Sign in as an administrator to your Canvas account and navigate to **Admin -> Developer Keys**.
2. Click "+ Developer Key" then "+ LTI Key."
3. Enter the required information, including Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method.
4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to **Public**.
5. Under Placements, add "Course Navigation" and "Assignment Edit" as the options.
6. Click "Save" and toggle the state to **On**.

After setting up the LTI key, you can install Claude LTI as an app in Canvas by following the instructions in the "Installing Claude LTI as an App" section.
